issues.description: First effect triggers OnKO but should prevent KO entirely via a Counter mechanic. The card text says 'would be K.O.'d... you may trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards instead' — this is a replacement/prevention effect, not a reactive KO action.
Second effect is completely incorrect. Trigger type and actions do not match card text. Card has no mention of trashing from hand or playing self.
RemoveLife is incorrect action. Card says 'trash 1 card from the top of your Life cards' — should be FlipLife (the standard action for moving cards from Life deck to trash).
No condition enforces 'Once Per Turn' limit on the effect.
